import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Send, Bot, User, FileText, Sparkles, Mic, MicOff, Keyboard, Volume2, Globe } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { mockDocuments } from "/src/app/data/documents.ts";
import VoiceInput from "/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx";
const suggestedQuestions = [
  "Skin tear procedure?",
  "Fire emergency steps?",
  "Medication error protocol?",
  "COVID-19 isolation procedure?"
];
export default function AICompanion() {
  _s();
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);
  const [inputMode, setInputMode] = useState("speak");
  const [isListening, setIsListening] = useState(false);
  const messagesEndRef = useRef(null);
  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  };
  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom();
  }, [messages]);
  const handleSend = () => {
    if (!input.trim()) return;
    const userMessage = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      type: "user",
      content: input,
      timestamp: /* @__PURE__ */ new Date()
    };
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setInput("");
    setIsTyping(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const aiResponse = generateAIResponse(input);
      setMessages((prev) => [...prev, aiResponse]);
      setIsTyping(false);
    }, 1500);
  };
  const generateAIResponse = (query) => {
    const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
    let actionSteps = [];
    let sourceDocument;
    if (lowerQuery.includes("skin tear") || lowerQuery.includes("wound")) {
      actionSteps = [
        "Clean the area gently with sterile saline",
        "Take a photo for documentation",
        "Complete Incident Report Form"
      ];
      sourceDocument = { title: "Wound Care Policy", section: "Section 4.2" };
    } else if (lowerQuery.includes("fire") || lowerQuery.includes("emergency")) {
      actionSteps = [
        "Activate nearest fire alarm",
        "Evacuate residents to safe assembly point",
        "Call 000 and notify supervisor"
      ];
      sourceDocument = { title: "Fire Safety Protocol", section: "Section 2.1" };
    } else if (lowerQuery.includes("medication") || lowerQuery.includes("drug")) {
      actionSteps = [
        "Stop and assess patient condition immediately",
        "Notify RN and medical officer",
        "Complete Medication Error Report"
      ];
      sourceDocument = { title: "Medication Management Policy", section: "Section 5.3" };
    } else if (lowerQuery.includes("covid") || lowerQuery.includes("isolation") || lowerQuery.includes("infection")) {
      actionSteps = [
        "Put on full PPE (mask, gloves, gown)",
        "Isolate person in designated area",
        "Report to Infection Control Officer"
      ];
      sourceDocument = { title: "Infection Control Policy", section: "Section 6.4" };
    } else if (lowerQuery.includes("fall") || lowerQuery.includes("fell")) {
      actionSteps = [
        "Do not move person - check for injury",
        "Call for immediate medical assistance",
        "Complete Incident Report within 24 hours"
      ];
      sourceDocument = { title: "Falls Prevention Policy", section: "Section 3.2" };
    } else {
      const relevantDocs = mockDocuments.filter(
        (doc) => doc.title.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) || doc.category.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery) || doc.type.toLowerCase().includes(lowerQuery)
      ).slice(0, 1);
      if (relevantDocs.length > 0) {
        actionSteps = [
          `Open "${relevantDocs[0].title}" document`,
          "Read the relevant sections",
          "Follow the outlined procedures"
        ];
        sourceDocument = { title: relevantDocs[0].title, section: "Main Document" };
      } else {
        actionSteps = [
          "Try rephrasing your question",
          'Use keywords like "safety", "incident", "medication"',
          "Or browse Document Suite for policies"
        ];
      }
    }
    return {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      type: "ai",
      content: "",
      // No long content, just action steps
      actionSteps,
      sourceDocument,
      timestamp: /* @__PURE__ */ new Date()
    };
  };
  const handleSuggestedQuestion = (question) => {
    setInput(question);
    handleSend();
  };
  const handleVoiceTranscript = (transcript) => {
    setInput(transcript);
    setTimeout(() => {
      if (transcript.trim()) {
        handleSend();
      }
    }, 500);
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "b9xy0", _fgB: 1779104382234, _fgD: true, className: "h-full flex flex-col", "data-fg-b9xy0": "418.290:529.27:/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx:174:5:5427:12972:e:div:xtetxtetxte:1", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "b9xy2", _fgB: 1779104382234, className: "mb-6", "data-fg-b9xy2": "418.290:529.27:/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx:176:7:5493:502:e:div:e", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "b9xy3", _fgB: 1779104382234, className: "flex items-center gap-3 mb-2", "data-fg-b9xy3": "418.290:529.27:/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx:177:9:5524:458:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "b9xy4", _fgB: 1779104382234, className: "w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-600 to-purple-500 flex items-center justify-center", "data-fg-b9xy4": "418.290:529.27:/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx:178:11:5581:192:e:div:e", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: Sparkles, _fgS: "b9xy5", _fgB: 1779104382234, className: "w-6 h-6 text-white", "data-fg-b9xy5": "418.290:529.27:/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx:179:13:5713:43:e:Sparkles::::::DD2N" }, void 0, false, {

_s(AICompanion, "vRIa7VSo7nMDxWY6LW+WU4QXVEc=");
_c = AICompanion;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "AICompanion");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/AICompanion.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
